notes: RF=8/16 blended Tensor candidate: RF=16 lowers combined median; report Tensor as RF-dependent effective coefficient, roughly RF16 lower 0.06-0.09 and RF8 upper 0.14-0.15 pJ/FLOP, not as a single pure circuit value
fixed ITER=8000000 auxiliary check; supports RF8 upper side but mixes RF=8/16; use with RF8/RF16 duration-scaling evidence
RF=8 duration-scaling check: seconds=10/20/30, 15/15 valid, power API 30/30 final; slope estimates 0.144-0.156 pJ/FLOP; supports upper side of Tensor method-sensitive range

RF=16 duration-scaling check: seconds=10/20/30, 15/15 valid, power API 30/30 final, power-state 30/30 ok; slope estimates 0.053-0.071 pJ/FLOP; proves Tensor coefficient is RF-dependent and should be reported as RF16 lower vs RF8 upper, not a single scalar

LR4/LR8 fixed-ITER focus promoted to Shared primary: treatment ITER=17,000,000, power API 30/30 final, power-state 30/30 ok, matched-control 10/10 valid, reliability accepted; targeted mixed-LR 0.152, interleaved 0.145, and LR8 paired 0.177 support the same order while LR16 lower-side remains method-sensitivity evidence

control-treatment-control paired LR=4 30s auxiliary; power API 18/18 final, power-state 18/18 ok, matched-control 6/6 valid, reliability accepted; confirms LR4 high-side Shared coefficient around 0.22-0.24 pJ/bit

combined control-treatment-control paired LR=8 30s auxiliary from original plus rerun2; power API 36/36 final, power-state 36/36 ok, matched-control 12/12 valid, reliability accepted; NCU sidecar shows shared bytes 1.0748e12 B, L1 bytes 0 B, L2 bytes 3.738e8 B, DRAM bytes 2.737e8 B; reinforces LR8 as reproducible middle evidence between LR4 high-side and LR16 low-side

LR=4, W_SM=64KiB, B/SM=16, 30s, 10 repeats; 9/10 valid and power API 30/30 final, but one weak-signal row remains; confirms Shared LR4 is higher than mixed LR4/8/16 primary, so report Shared as LR/method-sensitive roughly 0.15-0.24 pJ/bit plus LR16 low-side caution

combined control-treatment-control paired LR=16 30s auxiliary from original plus rerun2; power API 36/36 final, combined power-state 35/36 ok with one original reject excluded before pairing, matched-control 11/12 valid, reliability accepted_with_caution due high spread; rerun2 alone is accepted at 0.086 pJ/bit. LR16 remains lower than LR4/LR8, so use as lower-bound/method-sensitivity evidence, not as replacement primary

control-treatment-control paired LR=16 60s follow-up; power API 18/18 final, power-state 18/18 ok, matched-control 5/6 valid with one weak-signal row, reliability accepted_low_stability; confirms LR16 low-side persists at longer duration but signal fraction remains small, so it is lower-bound/method-sensitivity evidence only

interleaved C-T-C LR=4/8/16 30s follow-up; power API 36/36 final, power-state 36/36 ok, matched-control 12/12 valid, reliability accepted; aggregate median matches targeted primary, while factor summary shows LR4 0.199, LR8 0.145, LR16 0.0618 pJ/bit, confirming LR/method sensitivity rather than pure shared-memory circuit energy

fixed-ITER treatment follow-up with LR=4/8/16 and treatment ITER=17,000,000; power API 27/27 final, power-state 18 ok/9 caution all coefficient eligible, matched-control 8/9 valid, reliability accepted_with_caution due one weak LR16 row; bytes scale 1x/2x/4x and aggregate median 0.140 pJ/bit supports the Shared primary order while preserving method-sensitivity caution

LR16 fixed-ITER focus rerun with treatment ITER=17,000,000; power API 18/18 final, power-state 18/18 ok, matched-control 6/6 valid, reliability accepted; shows the prior fixed-ITER LR16 weak row was not persistent and places LR16 fixed-ITER lower-mid evidence at ~0.117 pJ/bit

targeted mixed-LR Shared stability rerun retained as auxiliary: W_SM=64KiB, B/SM=16, LR=4/8/16, power API 120/120 final, matched-control 29/30 valid; one LR16 weak/negative row remains, so use as range support rather than primary

control-treatment-control paired 30s combined run promoted to current Global L1 primary: W_SM=16KiB, B/SM=16, LR=4, two 6-treatment runs combined; power API 36/36 final, power-state 36/36 ok, matched-control 12/12 valid, reliability accepted; duration-scaling 0.156 pJ/bit remains auxiliary support with one invalid detail row

duration-scaling auxiliary with power-state audit attached: W_SM=16KiB, B/SM=16, LR=4, seconds=10/20/30, 14/15 valid; median 0.156 pJ/bit, OLS slope 0.147 pJ/bit, Theil-Sen slope 0.149 pJ/bit; retained as slope/duration support, not primary, because reliability has one invalid detail row

60s, W_SM=16KiB, B/SM=16, LR=4, 8 repeats; power API 16/16 final, power-state audit found 1 rejected treatment row and the filtered matched-control summary excludes it before pairing; median is lower than the 30s 0.153-0.156 pJ/bit runs, so use as control-drift/thermal sensitivity evidence, not as a replacement primary value

control-treatment-control paired LR=8 30s auxiliary; power API 18/18 final, power-state 18/18 ok, matched-control 6/6 valid, reliability accepted; lower than LR4 paired 0.148 pJ/bit and close to 60s auxiliary 0.119 pJ/bit, so Global L1 is duration/load-repeat sensitive and should be reported as an effective range around 0.11-0.16 pJ/bit rather than a pure constant

control-treatment-control paired LR=4/LR=8 30s combined run promoted to current L2 primary: W_SM=64KiB, B/SM=16, 12/12 valid, power API 36/36 final, power-state 36/36 ok, reliability accepted; targeted mixed-LR 0.978 pJ/bit remains auxiliary support with one power-state caution metadata row

targeted L2 stability rerun with power-state audit attached: W_SM=64KiB, B/SM=16, LR=4/8/16, 20s, 10 repeats; 30/30 valid; reliability accepted; one control temperature caution is coefficient-eligible and did not create invalid matched rows, so retained as mixed-LR support rather than primary

control-treatment-control paired LR=4 30s auxiliary; power API 18/18 final, power-state 18/18 ok, matched-control 6/6 valid, reliability accepted; supports the paired L2 primary around 1.0 pJ/bit and shows paired ordering reduces the older LR4 high-side drift

control-treatment-control paired LR=8 30s auxiliary; power API 18/18 final, power-state 18/18 ok, matched-control 6/6 valid, reliability accepted; NCU sidecar shows L1 hit 0.000003%, L2 hit 99.9368%, L2 bytes 1.076e12 B, DRAM bytes 1.262e9 B; reinforces the paired L2 primary around 1.0 pJ/bit

non-paired LR=4, W_SM=64KiB, B/SM=16, 30s, 10 repeats; 9/10 valid and power API 30/30 final, but one L2 row is power-state reject and negative; now treated as drift/order-sensitive high-side evidence because the cleaner C-T-C paired LR4 rerun is 1.027 pJ/bit
